keyFindings.description: Area 3 agent tests lock in OMO's Greek mythology role names — may need adjustment if downstream uses a mapping lookup instead of renaming agents
Area 2 tests prescribe specific public API method names (getDepth, getDescendantCount, enforceSpawnLimits) that may not match the final implementation design
Function.length arity checks (lines 146, 172) won't detect implementations using default parameters
Header comment references #200 but PR closes #270 — both correct but could confuse readers
No meta-test enforcing 'all 23 tests fail' invariant
asRecord helper could use a JSDoc note explaining its purpose
